Title: Lead Power Platform Developer | Full-Stack Software Engineer
Description: Leading development of an enterprise AI platform using React Native for desktop and Supabase (PostgreSQL, Auth, Functions, Vault) for backend, consolidating organizational LLM usage and enabling shared context across teams. Research and implement AI-assisted development workflows using Cursor IDE, GitHub Copilot, and Claude, applying agentic AI frameworks to automate documentation, improve code review quality, and accelerate feature prototyping. Maintain 12+ Microsoft Power Platform and SharePoint solutions for NIH (NHLBI); define governance frameworks, development standards, and best practices to meet federal guidelines. Mentor 1 developer and assist 2 testers with automated testing integration for Canvas and Model-driven apps; lead code reviews and reusable component development. Automate environment management with PowerShell and Python; co-administer shared Dev/Test environments while coordinating with DevOps for staging and production.

Title: Power Platform Developer | Full-Stack Software Developer
Description: Developed and maintained full-stack applications using Angular, React, Next.js, NestJS, LoopBack, and .NET with PostgreSQL and MongoDB backends, improving data accessibility and reducing vulnerabilities. Designed and deployed Power Platform solutions; integrated Power BI dashboards for real-time reporting and KPI-aligned insights. Led a SharePoint migration for 200+ users; implemented Microsoft Entra ID authentication with zero downtime using Angular and modern authentication patterns. Built an Approval Request system (Power Apps + Power Automate + SharePoint), reducing approval cycle time by ~50% and tracking 400+ requests annually. Architected secure on-prem access with Azure On-Premises Data Gateway, Key Vault, and REST APIs, saving $50K–$200K annually.

Title: Power Platform Developer
Description: Launched a centralized request management system, automating publication and presentation approvals and reducing processing time by ~40%. Authored Power BI reports for leadership, improving visibility into project status and resource allocation. Built a Monthly Status Report Management solution, automating reporting workflows and reducing manual workload by ~35%. Partnered with cross-functional teams to automate business processes, cutting administrative overhead by ~30% through Power Automate-based workflow optimizations.

Title: Computer Science Trainee
Description: Built dashboards and web applications using Node.js, Express, Angular, and LoopBack for real-time data visualization and improved enterprise application features. Developed features for a resource management prototype with role-based permissions in a proprietary authentication system. Improved application performance via caching and query optimization, reducing load times by ~30%.
